items.promptRawJa: 運転中、バス停に停まるバスに近づくさい、バスの急発進や通行人がバスの前に飛び出すことを防ぐため、どう対応するのが適切か。

D クラクションを鳴らし注意をしながら、加速して通過する

items.promptRawJa: 夜間の走行では追い越しをできるだけ避け、必要があればライトの上下切り換えで前車に合図をしてもよい。
items.promptGlossEn: While driving at night, you should avoid overtaking as much as possible, but if necessary, it is acceptable to signal the car in front by switching your headlights between high and low beam.

topCandidates.prompt: When driving at night, the driver should try as much as possible to avoid overtaking. When he really needs to overtake, he may switch the high and low beam lights to alert the vehicle in front.
